body:
### 数学符号 test
*行内数学符号*
$ 
矩阵A= \left(
	\begin{array}{cc}
		a & b \\
		c & d
	\end{array}
	\right)	
$
行间符号

-------

$$
\binom{n}{k} = \frac{n!}{k!(n-k)!}
$$

$$
A = \begin{Vmatrix}
	a_{11} & a_{12}\\
	a_{21} & a_{22}
	\end{Vmatrix}
$$
